description: Product Description Do you know that? When jogging, the sports glasses wiggle back and forth. In good weather, you want your sunglasses for climbing, but are constantly afraid of losing them. Lost your favourite glasses during the last sailing trip? When cycling the glasses have ever lost and scratched again?! With the STANDWERK glasses strap Pro you can now put an end to this. Our innovative design ensures extreme safety and protection against loss. Never worry again if you want to enjoy the time in the great outdoors. With the STANDWERK glasses strap, your glasses will fit perfectly with every movement. Get the STANDWERK glasses strap Pro now. Extremely secure Whether climbing, surfing, fishing, sailing, jogging or downhill biking: The STANDWERK glasses strap secures your glasses reliably and protects them from loss and falls. Maximum adjustment. Our innovative design: Due to the pulley effect, the length is easily adjustable, dimensionally stable and there are no protruding straps and hooks. Further advantages of the STANDWERK glasses strap Pro ANTI-SLIP COATING Thanks to the anti-slip properties of the special silicone mix, the glasses strap holds every strap, regardless of whether it is a sports glasses, reading glasses, or sunglasses. COMFORTABLE TO WEAR The ends of the glasses chain are made of extra soft and comfortable silicone. The coated tear-resistant band convinces with an incomparable and smooth wearing comfort. ABSOLUTE PREMIUM QUALITY Benefit from a brand that conquers the outdoor world with full passion for quality. High-quality materials and innovations distinguish the STANDWERK brand and the sports goggle strap. Passion with STANDWERK As an ambitious start-up we want to support outdoor adventurers and develop the best products. We combine team spirit with creativity and create superior innovations for you.
